entries.title: STROMATEIS 10 (VIA ON DANIEL 13:8b-9) on daniel 13:7
entries.excerpt: "In the morning" Susanna went to take a walk. It is not at all out of place (in order to pacify those who find examples in the sacred writing for everything that we do) to take a walk at a time such as this, for example, since back then one did well to take a walk in order to keep his own body healthy.
